Live transfer precedes documentation; live transfer must include explicit statement of what is not yet in the log. 3. Substantive acknowledgment restatement of understood risk plus stated intended action applies universally to all handoff confirmations. 4. Cross-coverage requests require specific scope and time limit; declining requires explicit net-risk justification. 6. results.norm: Conservatism scales with irreversibility: act as if the worse scenario is true until ruled out, with thresholds defined in advance per device class and per patient risk profile. Protocol departure whether triage reordering, load-state threshold deviation, or handoff floor departure is permissible only when the agent has direct current observation that the protocol will produce clearly worse outcomes, the deviation is the most conservative available option, and the deviation is immediately broadcast with reasoning. A retrospective account is required after any significant protocol departure. Pre-defined triage criteria order priority in degraded mode: immediacy of irreversible harm, device substitutability, cascade risk, and information integrity. Triage reordering requires the same conditions as any other protocol departure.
